candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet label for total current assets.
Asset section total but not current assets.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not target.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over alternate formatting.
Also a cash line, but appears only in one year and may exclude restricted cash differently.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the period
candidates.why: Cash-flow statement ending cash, not preferred when balance-sheet cash exists.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not balance-sheet target.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate differences in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Adjustment line, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Change in net Group cash pool
candidates.why: Cash-flow component, not cash balance.
Not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Other cash fow from transactions with shareholders
candidates.why: Financing cash-flow line, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Priority list uses balance-sheet cash labels exactly as reported; first choice is the cleaner recurring label.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total current liabilities line.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Component balancing line, not total current liabilities.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities.
Specific non-current component, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct total for short-term interest-bearing debt; excludes trade payables and taxes, and appears to be the clean current debt total.
Could be a component of short-term debt when the total current interest-bearing liabilities label is unavailable.
Interest-bearing current liabilities, but appears to consist of current lease liabilities here and should be excluded under baseline.
Current lease liabilities; explicitly excluded from STD baseline.

variables.notes: Priority list reflects label changes over time. Prefer 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' as the clean total when present. Use 'Short-Term Loan' in periods where the total label is absent. Excluded lease-related rows.

candidates.why: Direct current tax liability / taxes payable line.
Tax asset, opposite of taxes payable.
Cash-flow item, not balance-sheet payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; exact balance-sheet current tax payable label is clearly identifiable.

candidates.why: Exact total PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred net/total PPE measure.
Only a minor component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Other Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-account component, not total PPE.
Cash-flow capex, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from sale of tangible assets
candidates.why: Cash-flow line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total/net PPE line; preferred over component rows.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total assets line.
Exact net cash flow from operating activities line.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
